vulnerablePopulations: patients with limited access to specialist care
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ILAE criteria; generalized seizure semiology with EEG patterns; classification into generalized epilepsy syndromes

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; seizure control high in many syndromes with appropriate ASM

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: EEG access varies; pediatric neurology and epilepsy clinics concentrated in major cities
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Valproate, levetiracetam, and other ASMs based on syndrome and pregnancy risk; counseling on triggers and safety
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access to pediatric neurology and specialized EEG interpretation outside capitals
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Core ASMs available and good response in many generalized epilepsy syndromes
